items.title: Filing shows Shanghai-based MiniMax has begun preparations for a Chinese IPO; the AI company listed in Hong Kong in January and says its ARR has reached $300M (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Filing shows Shanghai-based MiniMax has begun preparations for a Chinese IPO; the AI company listed in Hong Kong in January and says its ARR has reached $300M (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Filing shows Shanghai-based MiniMax has begun preparations for a Chinese IPO; the AI company listed in Hong Kong in January and says its ARR has reached $300M (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 文件显示，总部位于上海的 MiniMax 已开始为中国 IPO 做准备；这家人工智能公司 1 月份在香港上市，表示其 ARR 已达到 3 亿美元（彭博社）
